decomposed_queries: Which trials have Name of ICI = 'Geparrrrnuevo'?
top_candidate_question: Which trials have Name of ICI = 'Avelumab'?
top_candidate_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Avelumab';
